title: Reimagined | Mod Support Addon
description: Farmer's Delight and other mods, in the style of the Reimagined resource pack by Reijvi.
body:
# Overview
Changes the textures of items, blocks and guis from various mods to fit in the style of the [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) resource pack.

![Example of some of the textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001c2069aeff7a28f7b3d9efb21eafd92f29c2f7.png)

# Mod Support
This resource pack currently adds textures for the following mods:
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [My Nether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/my-nethers-delight)
- [EarlyStage](https://modrinth.com/mod/earlystage)
- [Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) (GUIs)
- [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) (GUIs)
- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)
- ~~No Chat Reports~~ WIP

Make sure to visit the discord server if you have any suggestions!

# Additional Credits

- Reijvi, the creator of [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined).
